title: Microsoft Just Shocked The Entire AI World: 7 New AI Models
summary: Microsoft announced seven in-house AI models including MAI-Thinking-1 (a reasoning model), Scout (an always-on agent), Codename MDASH, and Majorana 2 (a quantum effort). The video argues this represents Microsoft's full-stack challenge to OpenAI, positioning itself as both partner and competitor while expanding control across models, agents, and quantum hardware.
